rationale: The reference is an exact DOI match to a prior JMR paper (10.1509/jmkr.43.4.618) that focuses on present bias, horizon sensitivity, and a psychological mechanism (outcome concreteness). The citing paper investigates the same intertemporal-choice phenomena and explicitly positions its subjective-time account against prior mechanism-based explanations, so this is plausibly a substantive theoretical/benchmark citation rather than an incidental mention.
